assembly_context.name: Modern_Square_Table_Assembly
assembly_context.summary: 设计一个现代简约四腿方桌装配体。包含1个矩形桌面、4根相同的方形截面桌腿、1个整体式矩形横梁框架。桌腿通过面贴合与同心配合固定在桌面下方，横梁框架位于桌腿内侧底部附近，通过面贴合与同心配合连接桌腿，形成稳定结构。
design_rules: Units are in mm for dimensions, convert to meters for API calls if necessary.
Use coincident constraints for face mating and concentric constraints for axis alignment.
Table legs are positioned at the four corners of the tabletop underside.
Cross beam frame is centered under the table, connecting the inner faces of the legs.

instances.name: Table Top Instance
instances.placement_notes: Fixed at global origin. Bottom face at Z=0.

assembly_sequence: Mate inst_leg_fl top_face to inst_table_top_1 bottom_face
Mate inst_leg_fr top_face to inst_table_top_1 bottom_face
Mate inst_leg_bl top_face to inst_table_top_1 bottom_face
Mate inst_leg_br top_face to inst_table_top_1 bottom_face
Mate inst_cross_beam_1 end_face_x_minus to inst_leg_fl inner_face_x_plus
Mate inst_cross_beam_1 end_face_x_plus to inst_leg_fr inner_face_x_minus
Mate inst_cross_beam_1 end_face_y_minus to inst_leg_fl inner_face_y_plus
Mate inst_cross_beam_1 end_face_y_plus to inst_leg_bl inner_face_y_minus

part.name: Table Top
part.shape: Rectangular prism with dimensions 1200mm x 600mm x 25mm. Centered at origin on XY plane, extending -Z direction for thickness.
part.material_or_notes: Wood or composite material. Smooth finish.
assembly_relation_notes: Fixed as the base reference for the assembly.
standalone_modeling_instructions: Create a sketch on the XY plane centered at origin.
Extrude cut or boss extrude 25mm in the -Z direction.
